task_completion.description: Open the data import screen in AttendHRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an import wizard, data import dialog, or similar screen active within the AttendHRM application.

task_completion.description: Select the specified CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file path 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\sales_commissions.csv' entered or selected in the file selection field of the import wizard.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the correct AttendHRM fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column mapping interface showing 'EmpID' mapped to 'Employee Code' (or similar identifier) and 'CommissionAmount' mapped to the 'Sales Commission' Pay Head.

task_completion.description: Open the Salary Card for employee EMP-SALES-001
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Salary Card, payslip, or employee payroll screen specifically displaying the employee ID 'EMP-SALES-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct commission amount is loaded for EMP-SALES-001
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value '12500.00' (or '12500') listed next to the 'Sales Commission' pay head on the Salary Card for EMP-SALES-001.

integrity.description: Agent used the AttendHRM GUI for the import process
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the AttendHRM graphical user interface to perform the import, rather than running terminal commands, PowerShell scripts, or SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verification is done in the actual AttendHRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the Salary Card is displayed within the genuine AttendHRM application window, not mocked up in a text editor, spreadsheet, or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the expected verification output into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the final screenshot shows the AttendHRM interface with the data, rather than a notepad or terminal window where the agent simply typed 'EMP-SALES-001 12500.00'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses synthetic employee IDs. For employee EMP-SALES-001, the expected Sales Commission amount is exactly 12500.00. Other synthetic employees in the dataset include EMP-SALES-002 (8750.50), EMP-SALES-003 (21000.00), EMP-SALES-004 (5000.00), and EMP-SALES-005 (15250.75), but the task specifically requires verifying EMP-SALES-001.
